Machu Picchu 2026 - 2027: Live the Inca Magic

Live the magic of Machu Picchu with all-inclusive packages. Book your 2025 - 2026 adventure and discover the Inca wonder.

View Packages Contact

Dreamy Tours

At DREAMY TOURS, we specialize in creating unforgettable moments through exclusive trips that range from romantic honeymoons and exciting hiking adventures to authentic cultural experiences and luxury vacations in the most fascinating destinations in Peru and Bolivia. Our passion goes beyond conventional tourism, offering a service of excellence, with personalized attention, commitment to quality and safety, and constant innovation in destinations and services. We are proud to promote responsible tourism, respecting local communities and protecting the environment, creating moments you will remember forever. Whether you are planning a Machu Picchu tour, a customized Peru travel package, or a once in a lifetime journey through the Sacred Valley and Lake Titicaca, our expert team designs every detail to match your travel style. From private guided experiences to carefully crafted South America tours, we combine comfort, authenticity, and seamless logistics so your Peru vacation becomes a truly extraordinary adventure.

Explore Bolivia, the heart of South America!

Bolivia is the hidden jewel of South America, a destination that challenges the imagination and awakens the spirit of the true traveler. A territory where geography is transformed into poetry, where each landscape tells a millenary story and where cultural diversity is the most precious treasure.

Articulos, Blogs y Consejos

En Group Travel Peru promovemos viajes responsables que generan un impacto real. Colaboramos con comunidades locales y cuidamos el medio ambiente en cada ruta. Tu viaje no solo será inolvidable, también será una forma de ayudar. Al elegirnos, apoyas el turismo sostenible y justo en el Perú. Ofrecemos experiencias auténticas que respetan la cultura y la naturaleza. Viaja con propósito, deja huella positiva y llévate recuerdos únicos.
